title: P0: cbor_put_tstr incorrect header for strings >65535
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:102-122 - len > UINT16_MAX uses 0x79 (u16) with only 2 length bytes and wrong header_len=3; leads to invalid CBOR and potential memcpy overrun. Incremental check or proper 0x7a for u32 length needed. codereview
close_reason: Fixed cbor_put_tstr in lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:88-140 with correct header_len calculation (supports 0/1/2/3/5 byte headers), proper 0x79/0x7a major type + full u16/u32 length encoding per RFC 8949, explicit >4GiB overrun guard before check_space+memcpy. 3 independent codereview passes (vyj4,mryr,clt1) filed with no P0-P1 findings after the logical chunk edit. Verified with bd ready. Duplicates in coap_keys.c/coap_msg.c left for separate bead per scope. No other files touched.
